title: HELPING HANDS REENTRY OUTREACH CENTERS - 211info
text: HELPING HANDS REENTRY YAMHILL COUNTY HELPING HANDS REENTRY OUTREACH CENTERS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides reentry based transitional housing. Participants have access to food and clothing, assistance with applying for health insurance, and a comprehensive needs assessment process supported by a case manager. Can provide information and referrals about identification replacement, schooling, and job placement services. 28380 NE Wilsonville Road Newberg, OR 97132 Eligibility: -Individuals who are re-entering the community from incarceration. -Clients must not have or be under the influence of any intoxicants on-site or individuals with a registered sex offense Hours: Phone: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 560-9387 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 560-9387 Michael Pollock Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Program entry is referral based through participating community partners. Community members cannot self-refer. Call or visit website to locate a referring agency. 211info is not a referring agency. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Yamhill County SITE HOURS: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Services: Transitional Housing/Shelter * Ex-Offenders Other Services Offered At This Location: DONOR SERVICES - DONATION PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. HELPING HANDS REENTRY YAMHILL COUNTY
